summary: Fixed critical i18n translation bug on HomePage.jsx. Duplicate 'homepage' keys in i18n.js were causing translation keys to display instead of actual text. Removed duplicate keys and verified all translations (EN/FR/AR) now work correctly across all homepage sections.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - notification count endpoint not found (cosmetic, not blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: i18n.js had duplicate 'homepage' keys in EN, FR, and AR sections. The second 'homepage' object was overwriting the first one (which had the correct keys like heroTitle1, trustedBy, etc.). Removed duplicate keys.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All i18n translations are now working correctly. Homepage, navbar, and all sections translate properly when switching languages.

homepage_translations_en.details: Hero: 'Master Cryptocurrency, Blockchain & Digital Finance', Features: 'Everything You Need to Succeed', Courses: 'Structured Learning Paths'

homepage_translations_fr.details: Hero: 'Maîtrisez la Crypto, la Blockchain et la Finance Digitale', Features: 'Tout ce dont vous avez besoin pour Réussir', Courses: 'Parcours d'Apprentissage Structurés'

homepage_translations_ar.details: Hero: 'أتقن العملات المشفرة والبلوكتشين والتمويل الرقمي', RTL direction applied correctly

language_switcher.details: Language switcher in navbar works correctly, switches between EN/FR/AR, RTL direction applied for Arabic

pricing_page.details: Pricing page displays correctly with urgency badge, 4 pricing cards, French content (hardcoded by design)

discount_popup.details: Discount popup appears with French text: 'Attendez ! -15% Sur votre premier mois'

arabic_audio_generation.details: API /api/media/status confirms 23 Arabic audios generated for all lessons

rtl_support.details: Arabic pages display RTL correctly - document.dir='rtl' applied, layout mirrors appropriately

bug_fixed.issue: Homepage showing translation keys (e.g., 'homepage.heroTitle1') instead of actual translated text
bug_fixed.root_cause: Duplicate 'homepage' keys in i18n.js - the second object was overwriting the first one which had the correct translation keys
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Removed duplicate 'homepage' objects from EN, FR, and AR translation sections in i18n.js
bug_fixed.verification: All homepage sections now display correct translations in all three languages
